hero.subtitle: CS Student & Applied LLM Engineer
hero.description: Final-year CS student with research and industry experience in LLM systems, RAG pipelines, and backend engineering. Built production systems at CMU and contributed to joint research at JAIST.

about.title: About Me
about.heading: Building AI Systems,
about.paragraph1: Final-year Computer Science student at Chiang Mai University with hands-on experience in LLM systems, RAG pipelines, and backend engineering. I've built production systems at CMU and contributed to cutting-edge research at JAIST in Japan.
about.paragraph2: My work focuses on the intersection of Large Language Models and Knowledge Graphs, particularly in building intelligent systems that can understand and process complex unstructured data. I'm passionate about creating practical AI solutions that solve real-world problems.
about.paragraph3: Looking to grow as an Applied LLM Engineer on an early-stage team where I can contribute to building innovative AI products while continuing to learn and develop my skills.
